The '''Livien League''' was a state located within the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] in the [[Pre-Republic era]]. It consisted of [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] such as [[Amarin]], [[Jhantoria]], [[Kanaver]], and [[Livien]]. The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] was [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]]. During the [[Cronese Sweeps]], the [[Pirate King/Legends|Pirate King]] [[Xer VIII]] tried to conquer the League but it successfully defied him and remained the only part of the Tion Cluster out of his control. After Xer's retirement, [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]] managed to defeat the League at the [[Battle of Jhantoria]], forcing its surrender and unusually for the Despot, integrating it into his empire mostly peacefully thereafter. Xim unified the cluster for the first time; [[Kingdom of Cron|Xer's Empire]] and the Livien League became [[Xim's empire|Xim's Empire]].

After the collapse of Xim's Empire following his defeat by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] at the [[Third Battle of Vontor]], the worlds of the old Livien League became part of the [[Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion]], and thereafter those worlds clustered around [[Livien]] at the head of the [[Desevran Trace]] became known as the '''Livien Worlds'''.
